query:
-- Search for remaining unmatched customers
SELECT externalId, name, businessName, contactEmail, status
FROM customers 
WHERE name LIKE '%Expert Electrical%' OR name LIKE '%Expert%Aus%'
   OR name LIKE '%Rochedale Village%'
   OR name LIKE '%Medpods%' OR name LIKE '%Medical%Yeppoon%'
ORDER BY name;

-- Find the RVC-STUB services in the services table
SELECT externalId, serviceId, customerExternalId, customerName, locationAddress, technology, speedTier, status, discoveryNotes
FROM services 
WHERE externalId LIKE 'RVC-STUB-%' OR serviceId LIKE 'RVC-STUB-%' OR discoveryNotes LIKE '%RVC-STUB%'
ORDER BY externalId LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute -- Search for remaining unmatched customers
SELECT externalId, name, businessName, contactEmail, status
FROM customers 
WHERE name LIKE '%Expert Electrical%' OR name LIKE '%Expert%Aus%'
   OR name LIKE '%Rochedale Village%'
   OR name LIKE '%Medpods%' OR name LIKE '%Medical%Yeppoon%'
ORDER BY name;

-- Find the RVC-STUB services in the services table
SELECT externalId, serviceId, customerExternalId, customerName, locationAddress, technology, speedTier, status, discoveryNotes
FROM services 
WHERE externalId LIKE 'RVC-STUB-%' OR serviceId LIKE 'RVC-STUB-%' OR discoveryNotes LIKE '%RVC-STUB%'
ORDER BY externalId LIMIT 20;
